description: Fix Ferri and Exon card logo display

userStories.title: Fix: hero-right vertical alignment on desktop
userStories.description: On desktop the right column (.hero-right) is only as tall as its content, so justify-content:center has no effect. The fix is to change align-items on .section-hero from flex-start to stretch so both columns share the same height. The mobile override (flex-direction:column at max-width:600px) must remain untouched.
acceptanceCriteria: In .section-hero CSS rule, change `align-items: flex-start` to `align-items: stretch`
No other CSS or HTML is changed
The mobile @media (max-width: 600px) block is not modified

userStories.title: Fix: Ferri and Exon card logos are cropped — use object-fit contain
userStories.description: The Ferri and Exon cards use logo images (./Immagini/Ferri.png and ./Immagini/Exon.png) but the global .card-thumb img CSS uses object-fit: cover which crops them. They need object-fit: contain so the full logo is visible, with padding for breathing room. Background colors should match the logo backgrounds: Ferri is blue (#1a7ac9), Exon is gold (#e8a800). The fix mirrors how the ILLY card is done: that img tag has style='object-fit: contain; padding: 20px;' inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Ferri card img tag has inline style: object-fit: contain; padding: 20px;
Exon card img tag has inline style: object-fit: contain; padding: 20px;
No other cards or CSS rules are changed
